expected.title: File system | Node.js v25.9.0 Documentation
must_not_contain: About this documentation Usage and example Assertion testing
Deprecated APIs Diagnostics Channel DNS Domain

notes: Node.js docs use <div id="apicontent"> for the main content and <div role="navigation" id="column2"> for the sidebar TOC. The selector chain has no matching selector (no main/article/role=main/#content). The heuristic fallback must score the #apicontent div above the navigation column to extract correctly. Chrome stripping should remove the role=navigation sidebar. The must_not_contain entries are the navigation list of all Node.js modules — if they appear, chrome stripping failed.
